top_signals.title: Reeves’ savings package to have minimal impact on inflation rise
top_signals.summary: A discount campaign launched by Chancellor Rachel Reeves will “shave off” an expected rise in inflation, analysis has suggested, as economists have raised concern over Britons’ inflation expectations.  Reeves’ move to delay a hike in fuel duty beyond September and offer VAT relief for businesses giving families reduced prices could strip 0.2 percentage points off [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Hub Group CFO, COO depart following accounting error
top_signals.summary:
Hub Group announced that its chief financial officer and chief operating officer have departed as it works to restate financial results following an accounting error.

The post Hub Group CFO, COO depart following accounting error appeared first on FreightWaves.

top_signals.title: Summer Heatwaves May Deepen the Global LNG Crunch
top_signals.summary: The global gas market, which has been reeling from the sudden loss of 20% of daily LNG supply, is poised to tighten even further in the coming months as higher-than-expected summer temperatures and the El Niño weather pattern are expected to raise gas demand in Asia.  Asian and European gas prices could rally even higher if the Strait of Hormuz remains inaccessible to most LNG tankers this summer, while Asia struggles to meet cooling demand and Europe looks to refill gas storage sites that have depleted to multi-year lows at the end…
